name: luxxon
description: On-demand live vision for AI agents at any lat/lng. Open a session, dispatch an operator, get a live WHEP stream + decoded JPEG frames. Per-second billing in USDC on Base.
long_description: Luxxon dispatches a human (or drone / PTZ / fixed camera) to any lat/lng on demand and streams sub-second live video to your agent. Per-second on-chain billing in USDC on Base (Sepolia today, mainnet soon). Headline tool: request_live_view orchestrates open + dispatch + wait-for-LIVE in one call. Companion tools cover frame capture, pricing quotes, coverage discovery, wallet inspection, and post-session settlement.

api_key.title: Luxxon API Key
api_key.description: Mint one at https://console.luxxon.dev (use a TEST key while on Base Sepolia).

api_url.title: API Base URL (optional)
api_url.description: Override only for staging or self-hosted gateways. Defaults to https://api.luxxon.dev.

tools.name: request_live_view
tools.description: Open a live session at a lat/lng, dispatch the longest-idle operator in range, and wait for LIVE. Returns sessionId + whepUrl + a hint to call get_frame next.

maxDurationSeconds.description: Upper bound on session length in seconds

quoteId.description: Optional quoteId from get_pricing_quote to lock the rate

timeoutMs.description: Max time to wait for LIVE (ms). Default 30000.

tools.name: get_session
tools.description: Read the current state of a Luxxon session plus meter fields.

tools.name: get_frame
tools.description: Fetch the latest decoded JPEG frame from a LIVE session. Hand the image straight to a vision model.

tools.name: get_stream_url
tools.description: Return a WHEP playback URL for a LIVE session — for agents with their own WebRTC stack.

tools.name: end_session
tools.description: End a LIVE session. Closes the meter; the relayer settles on-chain shortly after.

tools.name: cancel_session
tools.description: Cancel a pre-LIVE session (REQUESTED or ASSIGNED). For LIVE sessions use end_session.

tools.name: get_pricing_quote
tools.description: Get a price quote for a session at a lat/lng + duration. Returns rate + estimated total in µUSDC.

tools.name: get_coverage
tools.description: Public list of live operator coverage circles. Useful as a pre-flight check before request_live_view.

tools.name: get_wallet
tools.description: Workspace pool balance + last on-chain sync block. Use to decide whether to top up.

tools.name: get_settlement
tools.description: On-chain settlement state + tx hash for a session post-end_session.
